channel.title: Azure Backup on Sujith Quintelier
channel.description: Recent content in Azure Backup on Sujith Quintelier

item.title: azure: [In preview] Public Preview: Azure Backup for Cosmos DB
item.description:
Azure Backup for Cosmos DB is now in public preview. It adds vaulted backups for Cosmos DB accounts to support cyber-resiliency, compliance, and isolated backup storage.

  • Source: Azure Updates

item.title: azure: [In preview] Public Preview: Snapshot backup for SQL Server in Azure VMs
item.description:
Azure Backup now supports snapshot-based backup for SQL Server on Azure Virtual Machines in public preview. It uses Azure disk snapshots with native SQL transaction log backups to provide near-instant, low-impact full backups for large SQL databases.

  • Source: Azure Updates

item.title: azure: [In preview] Public Preview: Bulk Restore for Azure Virtual Machines using Azure Backup
item.description:
Azure Backup adds Bulk Restore for Azure Virtual Machines in public preview. Customers can restore up to 100 VMs in a single operation to simplify large-scale recovery.

  • Source: Azure Updates

item.title: azure: [In preview] Public Preview: Azure Backup for Elastic SAN
item.description:
Azure Backup now supports Elastic SAN in public preview. It can back up and restore Elastic SAN volumes to help protect against accidental deletion, ransomware, and application-related changes.

  • Source: Azure Updates
